from mqtt import *
import time
from event_manager import *
import sys
import uselect
from yolobit import *
button_a.on_pressed = None
button_b.on_pressed = None
button_a.on_pressed_ab = button_b.on_pressed_ab = -1
from aiot_rgbled import RGBLed
from machine import Pin, SoftI2C
from aiot_dht20 import DHT20
from aiot_lcd1602 import LCD1602

event_manager.reset()

def read_terminal_input():
  spoll=uselect.poll()        # Set up an input polling object.
  spoll.register(sys.stdin, uselect.POLLIN)    # Register polling object.

  input = ''
  if spoll.poll(0):
    input = sys.stdin.read(1)

    while spoll.poll(0):
      input = input + sys.stdin.read(1)

  spoll.unregister(sys.stdin)
  return input

tiny_rgb = RGBLed(pin1.pin, 4)

aiot_dht20 = DHT20()

aiot_lcd1602 = LCD1602()

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__led_(tr_E1_BA_A1ng_th_C3_A1i):
  global L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, qu_E1_BA_A1t
  if tr_E1_BA_A1ng_th_C3_A1i == '1':
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#0000ff'))
  else:
    if tr_E1_BA_A1ng_th_C3_A1i == '0':
      tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#000000'))

def on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__fan_(qu_E1_BA_A1t):
  global L_E1_BB_87nh_AI, tr_E1_BA_A1ng_th_C3_A1i
  if qu_E1_BA_A1t == '1':
    pin2.write_analog(round(translate(70, 0, 100, 0, 1023)))
  else:
    if qu_E1_BA_A1t == '0':
      pin2.write_analog(round(translate(0, 0, 100, 0, 1023)))

if True:
  mqtt.connect_wifi('vivo 1916', '12345678')
  mqtt.connect_broker(server='io.adafruit.com', port=1883, username='2213671', password='aio_oKZg90V6hW5UW6Zy6me44JrIQSKS')
  mqtt.check_message()

while True:
  time.sleep_ms(10000)
  event_manager.run()
  L_E1_BB_87nh_AI = read_terminal_input()
  if L_E1_BB_87nh_AI == 'A':
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#0000ff'))
    mqtt.publish('led', '1')
  if L_E1_BB_87nh_AI == 'B':
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#000000'))
    mqtt.publish('led', '0')
  if L_E1_BB_87nh_AI == 'C':
    pin2.write_analog(round(translate(70, 0, 100, 0, 1023)))
    mqtt.publish('fan', '1')
  if L_E1_BB_87nh_AI == 'D':
    pin2.write_analog(round(translate(0, 0, 100, 0, 1023)))
    mqtt.publish('fan', '0')
  aiot_dht20.read_dht20()
  mqtt.publish('temp', (aiot_dht20.dht20_temperature()))
  mqtt.publish('humi', (aiot_dht20.dht20_humidity()))
  mqtt.publish('lig', (round(translate((pin0.read_analog()), 0, 4095, 0, 100))))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(0, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('NHIET DO:')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(10, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('      ')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(10, 0)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr((str(aiot_dht20.dht20_temperature()) + 'C'))
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(0, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('DO AM:')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(10, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr('      ')
  aiot_lcd1602.move_to(10, 1)
  aiot_lcd1602.putstr((str(aiot_dht20.dht20_humidity()) + 'C'))
  if (round(translate((pin0.read_analog()), 0, 4095, 0, 100))) > 500:
    tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#000000'))
    mqtt.publish('led', '0')
  else:
    if (round(translate((pin0.read_analog()), 0, 4095, 0, 100))) < 10:
      tiny_rgb.show(0, hex_to_rgb('#0000ff'))
      mqtt.publish('led', '1')
  if (aiot_dht20.dht20_temperature()) > 40:
    pin2.write_analog(round(translate(70, 0, 100, 0, 1023)))
    time.sleep_ms(7000)
    pin2.write_analog(round(translate(0, 0, 100, 0, 1023)))
  mqtt.check_message()
  mqtt.on_receive_message('led', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__led_)
  mqtt.on_receive_message('fan', on_mqtt_message_receive_callback__fan_)
  time.sleep_ms(10)
